{{Infobox character
| name = Reader (The Elder Empire: Shadow)
| appears_in = The Elder Empire: Shadow
| titles = Chroniclers
| abilities = Reading, Awaken an object, Reader senses, Reader's awareness
| affiliations = Architects
| introduced = ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea
}}

''See also: [[Reader (The Elder Empire: Shadow) Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A Reader is an individual capable of sensing and manipulating human [[Intent]]. This discipline allows them to perceive various layers of reality, ranging from the minute history and details embedded in physical objects to the broad currents of [[Intent]] flowing through entire cities, armies, or landscapes. Beyond mere perception, skilled [[Readers]] can perform active [[Reading]] to physically alter objects by applying their [[Intent]], such as reshaping metal or paper. While many [[Readers]] focus on specific details or individual histories, some possess immense power that allows them to detect lies, sense emotions, and even influence the natural world. However, [[Reading]] carries significant risks; attempting to examine the [[Intent]] of an [[Elder]] directly is a major taboo that can result in insanity due to the alien nature of those minds. In society, [[Readers]] often hold positions of influence, such as [[Chroniclers]] or [[Inquisitors]]. They are frequently considered to be above standard legal authority because their abilities allow them to evade most forms of punishment or imprisonment. [[The Emperor]] of the [[Aurelian Empire]] is recognized as one of the most powerful [[Readers]] in history, possessing a level of skill and an expansive awareness that surpasses all others.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Readers]] are a specific type of individual capable of sensing and manipulating human [[Intent]], a discipline that allows them to [[Awaken]] objects. Through the use of specialized [[Reader senses]] and touch, they can determine information from items, though bringing out an object's full potential requires significant strength and focus. These individuals excel at various tasks such as investigating crimes, crafting tools, creating weapons, and performing subtle sabotage. While some [[Readers]] may lay curses for hire and the most talented are defined as [[Chroniclers]], they remain distinct from others like [[Shera]]. Ultimately, their unique abilities make them vital for specific needs, such as when a prisoner requests testing or when [[the Emperor]] seeks one who meets certain age criteria.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Readers]] are a type of individual, with some being able to lay curses for hire.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c1">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Chroniclers]] are talented [[Readers]] by definition.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The prisoner requests a Reader to test him.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c5">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Readers]] can consciously observe and manipulate the [[Intent]] stored in objects.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Readers]] are better at crafting tools, investigating crimes, creating weapons, enacting subtle sabotage, and manipulating information received by other [[Readers]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Readers]] can use [[Reading]] to determine information through touch.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Reading]] requires focus and strength to bring out an object's full potential.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Readers]] possess [[Reader senses]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c11">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] is not a Reader.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c12">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Reading]] is a discipline involving the ability to sense and manipulate human [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c14">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|A Reader can feel the power of [[Nakothi's song]] directly with their senses.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c15">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|A Reader is a person who can [[Awaken]] an object.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c19">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[The Emperor]] needs a Reader that meets several criteria, including age.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c24">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Readers]] are a specialized group of individuals capable of influencing the course of weapons through their unique powers. While they possess certain advantages and sensitivities, they are bound by specific rules regarding their abilities and often find that their visions lack sufficient detail. These individuals can perceive strong emotions and pick up visions from stored [[Intent]], though they possess very little [[Intent]] of their own to manipulate. This power causes the Reader's mind to expand and swirl upon the mists, making them significantly more powerful than standard prisoners. One of the [[Architects]] is a Reader, and they represent the specific target [[Shera]] seeks with her blade.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|A Reader is a type of individual with specific powers that [[Shera]] can target with her blade.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c2">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|A Reader is much more powerful than the prisoners [[Shera]] killed.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Readers]] have very little [[Intent]] to manipulate.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c3">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|A Reader is someone who can pick up visions from stored [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|A Reader can pick up on strong emotions through [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Readers]] have rules regarding what they can and cannot do.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c7">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Readers]] are a group of people who can influence the course of weapons with their power.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c11">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Readers]] possess certain advantages and sensitivities.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c14">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Readers]] often complain about a lack of detail in their [[Reading]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c18">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|One of the [[Architects]] is a Reader.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c19">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]]'s target is a Reader.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Being a Reader causes the mind to expand and swirl on the mists.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c21">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|A Reader would not be able to uncover Rudeus's connection to the [[Consultants]] after his blacks are burned.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c22">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Readers]] are a group that includes [[Lucan]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c17">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Loreli]] uses her Reader's awareness to sense through the water.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c18">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Readers]] are found among the [[Architects]] at [[Shera]]'s meeting.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A Reader was searching for [[Loreli]] close by.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“I’ve done nothing! Committed no crime! Let me stand trial, I beg you, and I will prove my innocence!” ... “Get a Reader! Test me!”<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c5" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|"I needed a Reader that fit several criteria, including age."<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c24" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Readers]]
